title: matricaria achilleifolia
intro: Matricaria achilleifolia, also known as Yombé or Achillea millefolium, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Matricaria achilleifolia include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
